CREATE TABLE test_data (val FLOAT, weight FLOAT);
SELECT quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(val, weight) FROM test_data;
SELECT quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.25)(val, weight) FROM test_data;
SELECT quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.75)(val, weight) FROM test_data;
SELECT quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.01)(val, weight) FROM test_data;
SELECT quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.99)(val, weight) FROM test_data;
CREATE TABLE additional_data (category AS toLowCardinality('A', 'B', 'C'), val FLOAT, weight FLOAT);
SELECT category, quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(val, weight) FROM additional_data GROUP BY category;
SELECT category, quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(val, weight) FROM additional_data HAVING count() > 1 GROUP BY category;
SELECT quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(val, weight) FROM test_data WHERE weight > 2;
SELECT AVG(quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(val, weight)) FROM test_data;
SELECT AVG(quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(val, weight)) FROM (SELECT val, weight FROM test_data WHERE weight < 4) AS subquery;
CREATE TABLE complex_data (test_id UInt32, val FLOAT, weight FLOAT);
SELECT test_id, quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(val, weight) FROM complex_data GROUP BY test_id;
CREATE TABLE more_complex (id UInt32, parent UInt32, sort_order UInt32, val FLOAT, weight FLOAT);
SELECT parent, quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(val, weight) FROM more_complex GROUP BY parent;
SELECT quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(SELECT val FROM complex_data WHERE test_id = 1, (SELECT weight FROM complex_data WHERE test_id = 1)) AS median_value;
SELECT quantileInterpolatedWeighted(0.5)(val, weight) AS median_weighted FROM test_data WHERE val > 0;
